subject: [PATCH v2 3/9] mm: percpu: fix obj_exts metadata charge size

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch fixes a metadata charge size calculation error in the Linux kernel's percpu code. The function pcpu_obj_full_size() was using an incorrect size for the obj_exts metadata, which is a vector of struct pcpuobj_ext. The fix involves changing the size calculation to use sizeof(struct pcpuobj_ext) instead of sizeof(struct obj_cgroup *). This patch addresses a bug introduced in commit 8f30d2660a38 and is part of a larger series of patches.
